summary: Coach-to-Athlete 'Flag for Follow-Up' feature - Full E2E testing complete. All 15/15 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: (1) PipelinePage shows 'Flagged by Coach' section with active flags and 'Done' button works, (2) AthletePipelinePanel shows flag icons on school rows that open FlagModal, (3) FlagModal allows selecting reason, note, due date, (4) JourneyPage timeline displays 'Coach Directive' and 'Flag Completed' events with distinct amber/green styling after bug fix.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: POST /api/roster/athlete/{athlete_id}/flag-followup creates flag with flag_id, creates timeline interaction, creates notification
VERIFIED: Only coaches can create flags (athletes and directors get 403)
VERIFIED: Coach can only flag their assigned athletes (403 for athlete_4 assigned to coach-garcia)
VERIFIED: GET /api/athlete/flags returns active flags sorted by created_at descending
VERIFIED: POST /api/athlete/flags/{flag_id}/complete marks flag complete, creates timeline entry, notifies coach
VERIFIED: GET /api/athlete/tasks includes coach flags (source: 'coach') sorted before system tasks
VERIFIED: PipelinePage displays 'Flagged by Coach' section with flag icon, coach name, due label, and Done button
VERIFIED: Done button calls POST complete endpoint and removes flag from UI with success toast
VERIFIED: AthletePipelinePanel shows flag icon on school rows (hover-revealed) that opens FlagModal
VERIFIED: FlagModal has 4 reason options, note textarea, 3 due options, submit button
BUG FIX: Timeline was not showing coach_directive/flag_completed as center events - added mappings to athlete_dashboard.py type_map
seed_data_creation: Multiple test flags created during testing for athlete_3 (Emma Chen) on Stanford and other schools
context_for_next_testing_agent: Coach Flag feature fully tested. Key data-testids: coach-flags-section, complete-flag-{flag_id}, flag-school-{program_id}, flag-modal, flag-reason-{key}, flag-note-input, flag-due-{key}, flag-submit-btn, conv-flag-coach_directive, conv-flag-flag_completed. Emma (athlete_3) has many active flags for Stanford. Login via Enter key (button click may not work). Bug fix applied to athlete_dashboard.py to map coach_directive and flag_completed event types for proper timeline rendering.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/athlete/tasks: WORKING - Returns coach flags + system tasks

frontend_athlete_view.flagged_by_coach_section: WORKING - Shows active flags with Done button
frontend_athlete_view.done_button: WORKING - Completes flag and removes from UI

frontend_coach_view.pipeline_panel: WORKING - Opens from Mission Control roster

timeline_display.coach_directive: WORKING - Amber centered event with flag icon
timeline_display.flag_completed: WORKING - Green centered event with checkmark icon

bug_fix_applied.issue: Timeline endpoint was not mapping 'Coach Directive' and 'Flag Completed' types to proper event_types, causing them to render as 'interaction' (right-aligned 'YOU' bubbles) instead of center-aligned milestones
bug_fix_applied.fix: Added 'coach_directive' and 'flag_completed' to type_map and added created_by_name to timeline output for proper attribution display
